spec.name: A Shaded Path Through The Forest
spec.description: You are on a small shaded path leading through the trees. The forest gradually lightens to the east. The path continues to the north, and to the south you see the main trail.

north.description: The path winds its way between the trees.

south.description: Through a break in the tree line you see the main trail that heads back towards Midgaard.

extra_descs.description: The shaded path is probably used by the small animals living in the forest.
They are mostly young oaks and tall beeches.
